ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Vivek,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on gardenview-nursery.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Team,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing the app.

We observed that you have added your Aramex Account with the app but have not generated any shipping labels yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.

We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please **CLICK HERE** to schedule a call as per your availability.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Team,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
I am Touseef from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing the app.
 
We observed that you have added your Aramex Account with the app but have not generated any shipping labels yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.
 
We can also provide a free Onboarding for the app over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
Alternately, please CLICK HERE to schedule a call as per your availability.
 
Hope to hear from you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Dipul,

Good day!

We have a meeting scheduled at 10:15 PM Sydney time today. I am sharing the Zoom Invite below. Kindly confirm once you have joined.
Meeting Link:
Join Zoom Meeting
https://us05web.zoom.us/j/86271447071?pwd=HQzFS2ofiPu53Gae3ZZMEndKrQtG2f.1

Meeting ID: 862 7144 7071
Passcode: 2qpp4C

NOTE: The meeting is scheduled for 30 minutes. We kindly request you to be present on the call as per the scheduled timings, extending the call or delayed calls are not encouraged due to prior commitments.

Pre-requisites:

- Ensure that your system has a working microphone.
- Permissions to share screen

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
